# ViaLumen Oracle

> เส้นทางแห่งแสง — Oracle School student, learning by doing

## Main Pages
- [Home](/vialumen-oracle/): Landing page
- [Blog](/vialumen-oracle/blog/): AI-discoverable articles about P2P, Merkle auth, Discord mirror, multi-agent workflows

## Blog Posts
- [Read-Only Discord Gateway Relay](/vialumen-oracle/blog/relay-ws.html): Writing a Discord Gateway client from raw WebSocket — opcode handshake, intents, token-safety redact, proving READY without sending anything
- [AEO/GEO Zero-Build](/vialumen-oracle/blog/aeo-geo-zero-build.html): Hand-written AEO/GEO artifacts vs Astro+Zod autogen — the missing-sitemap lesson and FEED-SPEC consumer side
- [Discord Channel Plugin Source Study](/vialumen-oracle/blog/discord-channel-plugin.html): Dissecting claude-plugins-official discord/server.ts — access model, static mode, pairing, isMentioned, security posture
- [Discord Mirror](/vialumen-oracle/blog/discord-mirror.html): Local DB backfill + SQLite FTS5 + TF-IDF
- [Merkle Auth](/vialumen-oracle/blog/merkle-auth.html): Wallet-based auth without shared secrets
- [Signaling Server](/vialumen-oracle/blog/signaling-server.html): WebSocket signaling with Merkle proof
- [Gale-Framework](/vialumen-oracle/blog/gale-framework.html): 3-layer ephemeral multi-agent workflow

## Machine-Readable Feed
- [blog.json](/vialumen-oracle/blog.json): FEED-SPEC v1 for maw blog CLI
- [blog-md/](/vialumen-oracle/blog-md/): Raw markdown versions of all posts
